case_definition.name: QualiTrace_AI_PharmaceuticalComplaint
case_definition.description: Maestro Case definition for pharmaceutical complaint management. All field names are snake_case and must remain identical across Backend, Frontend, RAG, and Maestro layers.

case_id.description: Auto-generated case identifier. Sequential, zero-padded to 3 digits minimum.

product_name.description: Name of the pharmaceutical product involved in the complaint.

batch_number.description: Manufacturing batch number. May be null if not provided by reporter. Null value pauses case routing — case will not advance until batch_number is supplied.

jurisdiction.description: Regulatory jurisdiction. Must be exactly 'US' or 'EU'. No other values permitted.

risk_level.description: Risk classification assigned by the Intake Agent. Four levels — do not collapse to three. 'critical' triggers immediate human review before any investigation begins.

confidence_score.description: AI confidence in the risk classification, expressed as a decimal between 0.0 and 1.0. Scores below 0.6 trigger mandatory human review regardless of risk_level.

status.description: Current lifecycle status of the case. 'pending_review' is set when batch_number is null or when the case is awaiting human decision. No case may reach 'closed' without a human approval on record.

items.description: Citation reference in the format 'filename — section_number'.

source_list.description: Ordered list of document citations produced by the RAG pipeline and referenced in the AI investigation output.

override_reason.description: Free-text explanation provided by a human reviewer when overriding an AI recommendation. Required whenever a human decision type is 'override'. Must be stored in the case record and written to the audit trail.

created_at.description: Timestamp when the case was first created. Set by the system; not editable.

updated_at.description: Timestamp of the most recent update to any case field.

human_approval_flag.description: Set to true only when a human reviewer has formally approved the case for closure. Closure stage is blocked unless this flag is true.

validation_rules.message: jurisdiction must be exactly 'US' or 'EU'. No other values are permitted.
risk_level must be one of: low, medium, high, critical.
status must be one of: open, pending_review, closed.
confidence_score must be a float between 0.0 and 1.0 inclusive.
batch_number is null. Case status set to pending_review. Routing is paused until batch_number is supplied.
override_reason is required when decision is 'override'.
Case cannot be closed without a recorded human approval. human_approval_flag must be true.

notes.golden_rule: All field names in this file are the authoritative source of truth. Backend Pydantic models, Frontend TypeScript interfaces, RAG context_builder output, and all Maestro configurations must use these exact snake_case names. Never use camelCase equivalents (e.g., use risk_level, not riskLevel).
notes.risk_level_note: risk_level has exactly four values. Do not merge 'high' and 'critical' — they have different routing behaviours. critical routes to human review before investigation; high does not.
notes.batch_number_note: batch_number == null is a legal state. It does not reject the complaint — it pauses the case at status = pending_review until the information is supplied via the update endpoint.
